# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve, ServingOptions } from "https://deno.land/std@0.169.0/http/server.ts";
import { create } from "https://deno.land/x/kv/mod.ts";

const db = await create();

const search = async (req: Request) => {
  const params = new URLSearchParams(await req.text());
  const userId = params.get('userId');
  const filterParam = params.get('filterParam');

  const key = ['users', userId, filterParam].join('/');
  const value = await db.get(key);

  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ result: value }), { status: 200 });
};

const options: ServingOptions = {
  hostname: '127.0.0.1',
  port: 8080,
};

serve(search, options);
